scripts.build: pnpm build:infrastructure && pnpm build:domains && pnpm build:nest && pnpm build:web
scripts.test:unit: pnpm --filter @eshop/event-bus-amqp test && pnpm --filter @eshop/outbox test && pnpm --filter @eshop/http-resilience test && pnpm --filter @eshop/observability test && pnpm --filter @eshop/inbox test && pnpm --filter @eshop/idempotency test && pnpm --filter @eshop/ordering-domain test && pnpm --filter @eshop/catalog-domain test && pnpm --filter @eshop/basket-domain test && pnpm --filter @eshop/identity-domain test && pnpm --filter @eshop/mobile-bff test && pnpm --filter @eshop/identity-service run test:unit && pnpm --filter @eshop/catalog-service run test:unit && pnpm --filter @eshop/ordering-service run test:contract && pnpm --filter @eshop/webhooks-service test && pnpm --filter @eshop/basket-service test
scripts.test:e2e:oidc: cross-env E2E_OIDC_ENABLED=1 pnpm --filter @eshop/e2e-tests exec playwright test --grep @oidc
scripts.stack:up: docker compose -f deploy/compose/docker-compose.yml -f deploy/compose/docker-compose.stack.yml --env-file deploy/compose/.env.stack.example --profile stack up -d --build
scripts.stack:down: docker compose -f deploy/compose/docker-compose.yml -f deploy/compose/docker-compose.stack.yml --env-file deploy/compose/.env.stack.example --profile stack down --remove-orphans
scripts.db:migrate: dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @eshop/catalog-service run prisma:generate && dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @eshop/identity-service run prisma:generate && dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @eshop/ordering-service run prisma:generate && dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @eshop/webhooks-service run prisma:generate && dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @eshop/catalog-service run prisma:migrate && dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @eshop/identity-service run prisma:migrate && dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @eshop/ordering-service run prisma:migrate && dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @eshop/webhooks-service run prisma:migrate
scripts.db:seed: dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @eshop/catalog-service run prisma:seed && dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @eshop/identity-service run prisma:seed && dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @eshop/ordering-service run prisma:seed
scripts.dev: concurrently -n identity,catalog,ordering,basket,webhooks,grace,payment,bff "dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @eshop/identity-service run start:dev" "dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @eshop/catalog-service run start:dev" "dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @eshop/ordering-service run start:dev" "dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @eshop/basket-service run start:dev" "dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @eshop/webhooks-service run start:dev" "dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @eshop/order-grace-worker run start:dev" "dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @eshop/payment-worker run start:dev" "dotenv -e .env -- pnpm --filter @eshop/mobile-bff run start:dev"
scripts.ci: pnpm build && pnpm contracts:check && pnpm test:ci
scripts.test:ci: pnpm test:smoke && pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:integration && cross-env E2E_RUN_HEALTH=0 pnpm test:e2e
